---
title: "LMM"
author: "bian"
date: "2025-12-18"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

## R Markdown

This is an R Markdown document. Markdown is a simple formatting syntax for authoring HTML, PDF, and MS Word documents. For more details on using R Markdown see <http://rmarkdown.rstudio.com>.

When you click the **Knit** button a document will be generated that includes both content as well as the output of any embedded R code chunks within the document. You can embed an R code chunk like this:

```{r cars}
summary(cars)
```

## Including Plots

You can also embed plots, for example:

```{r pressure, echo=FALSE}
plot(pressure)
```

Note that the `echo = FALSE` parameter was added to the code chunk to prevent printing of the R code that generated the plot.

```{r}
library(readxl)
library(lme4)
library(lmerTest)
library(tidyverse)
library(ggeffects)
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
source("anovakun_489.txt")
```

```{r}
data = read.csv("all_subjects_combined_gaze.csv")

# 将变量转为因子
data$subject <- as.factor(data$subject)

# 要移除的subject
remove_ids <- c()

# 方法1: 使用 %in% 和 !（最常用）
data <- data[!data$subject %in% remove_ids, ]

# condition重新编码：fm → f-kimera, u1m → u1-kimera
data$condition <- gsub(" ", "", data$condition)  # 去掉所有空格
data$condition <- gsub("^fm$", "f-kimera", data$condition)
data$condition <- gsub("^u1m$", "u1-kimera", data$condition)
data$condition <- as.factor(data$condition)

data$response <- 1-data$response
# RT转换为秒
data$RT <- data$RT / 1000

# percent反转后缩放：(100 - percent) / 100
data$percent_scaled <- (100 - data$percent) / 100

df_long <- data %>%
  mutate(
    # 時間単位の変換（フレーム数 → ミリ秒）
    aoigaze_ms = aoigaze * 1000 / 120,
    left_aoigaze_ms = left_aoigaze * 1000 / 120,
    
    # 条件の分類
    intimacy = case_when(
      condition %in% c("f", "f-kimera") ~ "friend",
      condition %in% c("u1", "u1-kimera") ~ "stranger"
    ),
    face_type = case_when(
      condition %in% c("f", "u1") ~ "normal",
      condition %in% c("f-kimera", "u1-kimera") ~ "chimeric"
    )
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    intimacy = factor(intimacy, levels = c("friend", "stranger")),
    face_type = factor(face_type, levels = c("normal", "chimeric")),
    subject = factor(subject)
  )


# 構造確認
df_long %>% count(intimacy, face_type)

# 変換結果の確認
df_long %>% 
  select(subject, condition, aoigaze, aoigaze_ms, left_aoigaze, left_aoigaze_ms) %>%
  head()

df_long <- df_long %>%
  mutate(percent_group = case_when(
    percent_scaled >= 0 & percent_scaled <= 0.3 ~ "low",
    percent_scaled >= 0.35 & percent_scaled <= 0.65 ~ "middle",
    percent_scaled >= 0.70 & percent_scaled <= 1 ~ "high"
  )) %>%
  mutate(percent_group = factor(percent_group, levels = c("low", "middle", "high")))

# 確認分組
df_long %>% count(percent_group)
```
```{r}
source("anovakun_489.txt")
aoigaze_anovadata <- df_long %>%
  group_by(subject,order, intimacy, face_type, percent_group) %>%
  summarise(aoigaze_ms = mean(aoigaze_ms, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

anovakun(aoigaze_anovadata, "AsBCD", 
         long = TRUE, 
         between = "order",
         within = c("intimacy","face_type", "percent_group"), 
         dv = "aoigaze_ms",
         eta = TRUE,cin = T,auto = T)
```

```{r}
aoigaze_anovadata <- df_long %>%
  group_by(subject, intimacy, face_type, percent_group) %>%
  summarise(aoigaze_ms = mean(aoigaze_ms, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

anovakun(aoigaze_anovadata, "sABC", 
         long = TRUE, 
         within = c("intimacy","face_type", "percent_group"), 
         dv = "aoigaze_ms",
         peta = TRUE,cin = T,auto = T)
```
```{r}
# anovakun の結果から手動でデータフレームを作成
aoigaze_sum <- data.frame(
  intimacy = rep(c("Friend", "Friend", "Friend", "Friend", "Friend", "Friend",
                   "Stranger", "Stranger", "Stranger", "Stranger", "Stranger", "Stranger"), 1),
  face_type = rep(c("Normal", "Normal", "Normal", "Chimeric", "Chimeric", "Chimeric"), 2),
  percent_group = rep(c("low", "middle", "high"), 4),
  aoigaze_ms = c(301.1642, 394.3487, 391.2255, 297.5858, 389.5728, 396.8750,
                 206.8260, 296.1835, 288.1127, 228.0760, 316.1064, 331.0539),
  ci_lower = c(237.3416, 310.6468, 317.6977, 246.5977, 306.3438, 329.8691,
               163.7416, 233.9059, 229.5004, 161.3669, 234.0219, 244.5619),
  ci_upper = c(364.9868, 478.0507, 464.7533, 348.5738, 472.8019, 463.8809,
               249.9104, 358.4611, 346.7251, 294.7851, 398.1909, 417.5460)
)

# 因子レベルの設定
aoigaze_sum$percent_group <- factor(aoigaze_sum$percent_group, 
                                    levels = c("low", "middle", "high"))
aoigaze_sum$intimacy <- factor(aoigaze_sum$intimacy, 
                               levels = c("Friend", "Stranger"))
aoigaze_sum$face_type <- factor(aoigaze_sum$face_type,
                                levels = c("Normal", "Chimeric"))

# 色の定義
colors <- c("Friend" = "#7B68EE",
            "Stranger" = "#FF8C00")
pd <- position_dodge(width = 0.15)

# プロット作成
ggplot(aoigaze_sum, aes(x = percent_group, y = aoigaze_ms, 
                        color = intimacy, group = intimacy)) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = ci_lower, ymax = ci_upper),
                width = 0.1, linewidth = 0.6, position = pd) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 0.8, position = pd) +
  geom_point(size = 3, position = pd) +
  facet_wrap(~ face_type, ncol = 2) +
  scale_color_manual(values = colors, name = "Intimacy") +
  scale_x_discrete(labels = c("Low", "Middle", "High")) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(100, 500), breaks = seq(100, 500, 100)) +
  labs(x = "Morphing Percentage", y = "AOIgaze Time (ms)") +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", linewidth = 0.8),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 10, color = "black"),
    legend.position = "bottom",
    legend.title = element_text(size = 11, face = "bold"),
    strip.text = element_text(size = 11, face = "bold"),
    strip.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color = "black")
  )

ggsave("gaze.png", width = 8, height = 5, dpi = 300)
```

```{r}
leftaoigaze_anovadata <- df_long %>%
  group_by(subject,order, intimacy, face_type, percent_group) %>%
  summarise(left_aoigaze_ms = mean(left_aoigaze_ms, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

anovakun(leftaoigaze_anovadata, "AsBCD", 
         long = TRUE, 
         between = "order",
         within = c("intimacy","face_type", "percent_group"), 
         dv = "left_aoigaze_ms",
         eta = TRUE)
```

```{r}
leftaoigaze_anovadata <- df_long %>%
  group_by(subject, intimacy, face_type, percent_group) %>%
  summarise(left_aoigaze_ms = mean(left_aoigaze_ms, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

anovakun(leftaoigaze_anovadata, "sABC", 
         long = TRUE, 
         within = c("intimacy","face_type", "percent_group"), 
         dv = "left_aoigaze_ms",
         peta = TRUE,cin = T,auto = T)
```
```{r}
library(ggplot2)

# anovakun の結果から手動でデータフレームを作成
data <- data.frame(
  intimacy = rep(c("Friend", "Friend", "Friend", "Friend", "Friend", "Friend",
                   "Stranger", "Stranger", "Stranger", "Stranger", "Stranger", "Stranger"), 1),
  face_type = rep(c("Normal", "Normal", "Normal", "Chimeric", "Chimeric", "Chimeric"), 2),
  percent_group = rep(c("low", "middle", "high"), 4),
  Mean = c(91.8995, 115.0840, 123.7010, 129.9877, 159.1807, 154.8897,
           70.2328, 104.2577, 92.1446, 111.5196, 159.1457, 151.5686),
  CIN_L = c(57.5208, 71.0401, 79.2061, 83.7888, 98.6711, 106.3309,
            39.2474, 83.0129, 65.4312, 89.4699, 88.8099, 105.2313),
  CIN_U = c(126.2782, 159.1279, 168.1959, 176.1866, 219.6902, 203.4485,
            101.2183, 125.5025, 118.8580, 133.5693, 229.4814, 197.9059)
)

# 因子レベルの設定
data$percent_group <- factor(data$percent_group, 
                              levels = c("low", "middle", "high"))
data$intimacy <- factor(data$intimacy, 
                         levels = c("Friend", "Stranger"))
data$face_type <- factor(data$face_type,
                          levels = c("Normal", "Chimeric"))

# 色の定義
colors <- c("Friend" = "#7B68EE",
            "Stranger" = "#FF8C00")
pd <- position_dodge(width = 0.15)

# プロット作成
ggplot(data, aes(x = percent_group, y = Mean, 
                 color = intimacy, group = intimacy)) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = CIN_L, ymax = CIN_U),
                width = 0.1, linewidth = 0.6, position = pd) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 0.8, position = pd) +
  geom_point(size = 3, position = pd) +
  facet_wrap(~ face_type, ncol = 2) +
  scale_color_manual(values = colors, name = "Intimacy") +
  scale_x_discrete(labels = c("Low", "Middle", "High")) +
  labs(x = "Morphing Percentage", y = "Left AOI Gaze Duration (ms)") +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", linewidth = 0.8),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 10, color = "black"),
    legend.position = "bottom",
    legend.title = element_text(size = 11, face = "bold"),
    strip.text = element_text(size = 11, face = "bold"),
    strip.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color = "black")
  )

ggsave("apa_left_aoigaze_plot.png", width = 8, height = 5, dpi = 300)
```
